prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DIAMOND-BURR-80 Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 30pc Universal Diamond Drill Bit Burr Set Rotary Tools 80 Grit Description: The 30pc Universal Diamond Burr Set is the ideal accessory for your Dremel or handheld rotary tool. Each set comes with 30 high quality diamond burr heads in assorted sizes and shapes. These burrs can be used for medium material removal by carving, etching, grinding and sanding.

Each burr features a 1/8" shank and 80 grit, with a sturdy compact case for easy transportation and storage while not in use. These are great for working with ceramics, stone, glass, tile, wood, fiberglass, all natural materials and more. Search Terms: rotary burr set diamond 150 grit bit Hobbies Crafts DIY crafting cutting shaping jewlery making for sets Features: - 30pc Set - Shank Size 1/8" and 1/32"-3/16" Head Diameter - Grit: 80 - Great for Working w/ Ceramics, Stone, Glass, Tile, Wood, Fiberglass, All Natural Materials & More! - Comes In Sturdy Compact Case === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 30-pc Diamond Burr Set 80 Grit

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 30-Pc Diamond Drill Bit Burr Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 18 Inch Shank, Assorted Sizes And Shapes, Ceramics Stone Glass Tile Wood, Compact Storage Case
